verdict: Rhythmically accurate and well-structured, but too complex and physically demanding for an Easy chart.

issues.problem: Extensive 1.5-beat syncopation (eighth-note offbeats) combined with holds (e.g., the hold starting at 51.172 on an offbeat) is too complex and unintuitive for an Easy chart.
The 11-note quarter-note stream at 152 BPM is too long for beginners, and the movement around 25.711 forces an uncomfortable crossover or double-tap.
With 14 jumps in a 60-second song, the physical demand and coordination required are too high for the Easy difficulty tier.
